text:

Author: gerald

Log:
  Update to the 20180930 snapshot of GCC 9.

  This contains a partial fix in the context of PR 231804 that I made
  upstream, cf. https://gcc.gnu.org/ml/gcc-patches/2018-10/msg00076.html .

  PR:		231804
